strava.note: Official Strava OAuth API. DISABLED: since 2026-06-30 Strava's API requires a paid subscription. Set enabled:true only if you subscribe and have creds in .env. Free path is strava_csv below.

strava_csv.note: Free path: reads Strava's bulk data export (activities.csv) dropped into imports/ as strava_*.csv. No API, no subscription. See imports/README.md.

mynetdiary.note: Reads the official CSV export you drop into imports/.

liftoff.note: Reads a workout JSON export you drop into imports/ (liftoff_*.json). Off by default; enable with --enable-liftoff. Personal use only. Set weight_in_kg:true only if your Liftoff app displays weights in kg (the export uses your app's display units); default false = pounds.
